commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Their rulers The chief of them, and Annas, the high priest; perhaps he had lately succeeded Caiphas, high priest of the year before. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Interlinear Gloss
commentaries.content: And again they set off the business with the form of a tribunal, to constitute them guilty by their iniquitous sentence. Again in Jerusalem: and there it is that men’s blood is poured out; no reverence for their city either.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
